problem id: 410837d0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(2)

examples:
  10000100 -> 00100001
  11010110 -> 00110101
  11001111 -> 00110011
  11000110 -> 00110001
  00010010 -> 00000100
  01100001 -> 00011000
  10101111 -> 00101011
  01110001 -> 00011100
  11110011 -> 00111100

query: 10110111
predicted answer: 00101101
